# Zonoir

> This is a static fallback. For the full, up-to-date version with all 400+ doctor profiles, visit:
> https://anqhnkcppujulkugcpee.supabase.co/functions/v1/dynamic-llms-txt

Zonoir is Pakistan's leading EMR and clinic management platform.

- Website: https://zonoir.com
- Find Doctors: https://zonoir.com/find-doctors
- Features: https://zonoir.com/features
- Pricing: https://zonoir.com/pricing
- Contact: https://zonoir.com/contact
